mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.category_id, p.price, p.created_at, c.name as category_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.category_id,p.price, p.created_at, c.name as category_name, s.quantity AS stockQuantity FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN stocks s ON p.id = s.product_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products(name, category_id, price) VALUES(#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price})
mapper.update: UPDATE stocks SET quantity = quantity + #{changeQuantity}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT quantity FROM stocks WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_histories(product_id, change_quantity, history_type) VALUES(#{productId}, #{changeQuantity}, #{historyType})
